name: Antlr4
description: ANTLR (ANother Tool for Language Recognition) is a powerful parser generator for reading, processing, executing,
or translating structured text or binary files. I've made this fork to implement C++17 support for my own projects.

name: BITX40 Sketch
description: BITX40 sketch for Raduino, forked for the odd time I make changes. So far all my pull requests have been
accepted so you should probably just go to the upstream repository.

name: ESP 8266
description: Arduino sketches for ESP 8266 based devices. a sketch which measures and reposrt temperature and humidity to
a REST service. The sketch uses the ESP 8266 deep sleep mode between readings to reduce current consumption.

name: EzNetwork
description: A C++ library with the goal of easing the task of managing network connections. Since the C++ standard library
lacks nework support. Hoping C++20 will provide so I only do work required to support my on projects.

name: ParameterLib
description: An include only, template based C++ wrapper around GNU getopt_long.

name: PiDP-8-sim
description: A PDP-8 simulator for the Raspberry Pi aimed at running efficiently on the A+ model and working with the PiDP8
kit. Work on this project is suspended in favour of PiDP-8-sim-cpp/

name: PiDP-8-sim-cpp
description: A complete re-write of my PDP-8 simulator project for the Raspberry Pi; still aimed at running efficiently on
the A+ model and working with the PiDP8 kit. Currently porting to C++17. This work will feature in my Why C++
